action.proof_term:
intro N k p hkn hp
  have hbase : p ∣ 2520 * N := Dvd.dvd.mul_right hp N
  constructor
  · intro hshift
    have h := Nat.dvd_sub hbase hshift
    rwa [show 2520 * N - (2520 * N - k) = k by omega] at h
  · intro hk
    exact Nat.dvd_sub hbase hk

intro N k p hkn hp
  have hbase : p ∣ 2520 * N := Dvd.dvd.mul_right hp N
  constructor
  · intro hshift
    have h := Nat.dvd_sub hbase hshift
    rwa [show 2520 * N - (2520 * N - k) = k by omega] at h
  · intro hk
    exact Nat.dvd_sub hbase hk

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
